questions.question: Explain why daemons use the double-fork technique during creation.
expectedPoints: First fork creates child process and terminates parent
Child calls setsid() to create new session
Second fork ensures process is not session leader

questions.question: Describe the complete process of creating a daemon, including all necessary steps and their purposes.
expectedPoints: Call fork() and exit parent process
Second fork to ensure not session leader
Reset file creation mask with umask(0)
Implement proper error logging with syslog
